name: White Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped white chocolate and water at the top of a double boiler.
2. Keep over medium-low heat and stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. Remove from the heat and set aside to cool, stirring occasionally.
4. Beat the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
5. Whisk one-third of the whipped cream into the melted chocolate, incorporating it completely.
6. Gently fold in the remaining cream.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
